title: Word Wrap Timeline Group Name
excerpt: I would like to suggest that the group name of a timeline on the left-hand side should word wrap to the next line, instead of truncating with a “…”. It would make the timeline much more presentable for reporting purposes…

posts.author: cberman (Corey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to suggest that the group name of a timeline on the left-hand side should word wrap to the next line, instead of truncating with a “…”. It would make the timeline much more presentable for reporting purposes.
Especially when multiple items stack, there is plenty of vertical white space to have the name wrap to another line.
Thank you!
